This field also enables linkage between the Part D Event file and the CCW prescriber characteristics 
file. This variable is only available 2006–2013. 

SHORT NAME: CCW_PRSCRBR_ID 

LONG NAME: CCW_PRSCRBR_ID 

TYPE: NUM 

LENGTH: 12 

SOURCE: PDE and HCIdea™ Prescriber Database (derived) 

VALUES: Null, or any positive or negative number 

COMMENT: Beginning with 2014 data, this variable has been retired and researchers may obtain both the actual
